mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 083 > lore > Note that this trait does not mean every
mechanics.excerpt: Note that this trait does not mean every single person in the area knows about the character; but rather that there is chance they might. Characters with the Good Reputation Trait receive moditier Negotiation Protocol and Seduction Checks in the affected region_ The gamemaster can also apply this modifier to other TNs as he deems appropriate. FIGHTER PILOT PHENOTYPE Cost: Clan scientists have put considerable effort into the fight- pilot phenotype resulting in the most radical, but ironically least effective of the Clan trueborn strains.
